decision.summary: Hold the weekly 64k dip position and do not open any new BTC position this cycle.
decision.rationale: The open weekly position `will-bitcoin-dip-to-64k-march-30-april-5` on `Yes` is weak but still above the playbook stop-loss threshold, with live Polymarket probability at 20.5%, so it does not require closing or reducing. Recent transcripts and summaries keep Beecthor macro bearish and still looking for lower lows, but Binance spot at 68676.08 shows the squeeze is still extending, which delays the downside path. Even though the nearest daily bearish strike would be 68k, the provided context includes no new Beecthor video beyond 2026-03-31, and the playbook rule says no new Beecthor video means no bet, so no new entry is allowed.
